title: Brawler + Shockboxer talent cleanup, with Teras Kasi reaction addendum

trees.name: Master of Teras Kasi
trees.scopeNote: Addendum only for Unarmed Parry and Unarmed Counterstrike reaction wiring from T20.

summary.naturalWeaponPolicy: Any rule in this batch that says unarmed attacks uses the same unarmed-family surface as the virtual Unarmed Strike and species natural weapons.

changes: ReactionEngine now derives reaction keys from owned feat/talent abilityMeta in addition to actor.system.derived.reactions.
Unarmed Parry is registered as an ON_ATTACK_DECLARED reaction for incoming melee attacks while the defender is fighting defensively and not flat-footed.
Unarmed Parry rolls an unarmed-family weapon, preferring an owned natural/unarmed weapon and falling back to the virtual Unarmed Strike.
Incoming attack cards now carry attackTotal/DC into reaction buttons so Unarmed Parry can compare against the attack roll like Block/Deflect compare against a DC.
Unarmed Counterstrike is registered as an ON_REACTION_SUCCESS follow-up and is announced when Unarmed Parry succeeds.
Retaliation Jab is registered for future ON_ATTACK_MISSED reaction windows, while remaining a truthful reaction lane card today.
Added attackAbilityBonus support for opt-in attack options such as Hammerblow.
Added halfLevelMinusOne damage formula support so Devastating Melee Smash can add the net extra over Melee Smash instead of double-counting the base +1.
Brawler/Shockboxer unarmed options use requiresUnarmed, which already treats species natural weapons as unarmed-family attacks.
Grab attempts now use the virtual Unarmed Grab weapon, so unarmed-family damage/proficiency surface is shared.
Grab attack penalty is reduced to -2 for Entangler and 0 for Grabber.
Grapple checks now read GRAPPLE_BONUS rules from owned talent/feat metadata, enabling Expert Grappler's +2 competence bonus.

talentChanges.name: Unarmed Parry
talentChanges.notes: Grants unarmedParry reaction key and incoming attack reaction pill support.

talentChanges.name: Unarmed Counterstrike
talentChanges.notes: Registered as follow-up after successful Unarmed Parry; still not auto-fired until reaction-success chaining is expanded.

talentChanges.name: Cantina Brawler
talentChanges.notes: +2 attack/damage while flanked is now an opt-in unarmed/natural weapon option.

talentChanges.name: Hammerblow
talentChanges.notes: Adds Strength modifier one extra time to unarmed-family attack rolls when toggled for empty-hands context.

talentChanges.name: Sucker Punch
talentChanges.notes: Exports target AoO suppression as an on-hit rider for denied-Dex melee attacks.

talentChanges.name: Entangler
talentChanges.notes: Grab penalty reduction to -2 is wired; ongoing target attack penalty remains state/manual.

talentChanges.name: Strong Grab
talentChanges.notes: Break-action increase is a manual grabbed-target state card.

talentChanges.name: Expert Grappler
talentChanges.notes: +2 competence bonus on Grapple checks wired through SWSEGrappling.

talentChanges.name: Make Do
talentChanges.notes: Improvised weapon penalty suppression exposed as a contextual attack flag.

talentChanges.name: Grabber
talentChanges.notes: Normal Grab -5 penalty is removed in SWSEGrappling.

talentChanges.name: Bayonet Master
talentChanges.notes: Full Attack/double-weapon package remains carded until FullAttackExecutor handles bayonet-as-double-weapon.

talentChanges.name: Experienced Brawler
talentChanges.notes: Three once-per-encounter standard-action sub-actions surfaced as explicit cards.

talentChanges.name: Devastating Melee Smash
talentChanges.notes: Declared melee attack option adds net half-level-over-Melee-Smash damage.

talentChanges.name: Man Down
talentChanges.notes: Ally-downed movement trigger surfaced as reaction card.

talentChanges.name: Counterpunch
talentChanges.notes: Fight Defensively AoO trigger surfaced as reaction card.

talentChanges.name: Pick a Fight
talentChanges.notes: Surprise-round morale aura and encounter target memory surfaced as marker card.

talentChanges.name: Unrelenting Assault
talentChanges.notes: Miss/negated melee damage rider surfaced; future post-attack miss hook can consume riderRules.

talentChanges.name: Unbalance Strike
talentChanges.notes: Grappled-target Strength-to-attack suppression remains manual/contextual.

talentChanges.name: Stinging Jab
talentChanges.notes: Unsafe +2 attack modifier removed; half-damage rider is an opt-in unarmed/natural weapon hit option.

talentChanges.name: Retaliation Jab
talentChanges.notes: Unsafe +2 attack modifier removed; registered for future ON_ATTACK_MISSED reaction window and surfaced as lane card.

remainingLimitations: Retaliation Jab's ON_ATTACK_MISSED reaction is registered, but the current attack chat flow opens reaction windows before attack resolution. A future post-miss event hook should surface it automatically.
Unarmed Counterstrike is registered as a reaction-success follow-up, but the current reaction engine does not yet chain ON_REACTION_SUCCESS buttons automatically.
Bayonet Master needs a specialized FullAttackExecutor package for bayonet-as-double-weapon handling before it should become executable automation.
